name: eval specs: active eval specs are tagged bootstrap_seed:true per O-1 seed corpus convention (initial baseline)
command: for f in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/evals/specs"/g-react-*.json; do grep -E "\"bootstrap_seed\":true" "$f" >/dev/null || { echo "FAIL $f missing bootstrap_seed:true" 1>&2; exit 1; }; done; echo ok 1>&2
